item:beer.description: Liquid morale. The economy is clearly fine.
item:beer.name: Beer

item:blueprint.description: A finished blank plan. Drag a known build target onto it to burn in the idea without sacrificing the original.
item:blueprint.name: Blank Blueprint

item:blueprint-draft.description: A nearly usable blank plan. Construction bureaucracy is blooming.
item:blueprint-draft.name: Blueprint Draft

item:blueprint-fragment.description: A bigger blank plan piece. Still technically a mess, but taller.
item:blueprint-fragment.name: Blueprint Fragment

item:coal.description: Black fuel for machines that apparently need motivation.
item:coal.name: Coal

item:coal-mine-1.description: Produces coal only after it receives sausage and beer. Labor relations remain advanced nonsense.
item:coal-mine-1.name: Coal Mine I

item:coin.description: A small metal excuse for progression.
item:coin.name: Coin

item:coin-chest.description: A boxed-up upgrade fund. Finally, clutter with ambition.
item:coin-chest.name: Coin Chest

item:coin-pair.description: Two coins. Somehow this already feels like accounting.
item:coin-pair.name: Coin Pair

item:coin-stack.description: A stack of little reasons to open the upgrades sheet.
item:coin-stack.name: Coin Stack

item:crate-1.description: A finite producer with suspicious contents.
item:crate-1.name: Common Crate

item:crate-3.description: A tiny treasure economy in a box.
item:crate-3.name: Rare Crate

item:crate-4.description: Purple box. The economy is doomed.
item:crate-4.name: Epic Crate

item:crystal.description: Shiny enough to justify bad decisions.
item:crystal.name: Crystal

item:epic-key.description: A diamond-studded key that opens the Epic Crate.
item:epic-key.name: Epic Key

item:lumber-camp-1.description: A polite machine for turning time into sticks.
item:lumber-camp-1.name: Lumber Camp I

item:lumber-camp-2.description: Still wood, but now with ambition.
item:lumber-camp-2.name: Lumber Camp II

item:lumber-camp-5.description: At this point the forest has filed a complaint.
item:lumber-camp-5.name: Lumber Camp V

item:ore.description: Stone with ambition and questionable impurities.
item:ore.name: Ore

item:plank.description: Wood with straight edges. Humanity briefly improves.
item:plank.name: Plank

item:quarry-1.description: A hole in the ground with a business model.
item:quarry-1.name: Quarry I

item:quarry-2.description: A deeper hole, because progress is weird.
item:quarry-2.name: Quarry II

item:quarry-3.description: Rocks leaving the earth at startup velocity.
item:quarry-3.name: Quarry III

item:quarry-4.description: A sophisticated hole. Still a hole.
item:quarry-4.name: Quarry IV

item:quarry-5.description: Rocks surrender before the tap lands.
item:quarry-5.name: Quarry V

item:sausage.description: Producer fuel, because workers are tragically organic.
item:sausage.name: Sausage

item:seed.description: Tiny start of something suspiciously grindy.
item:seed.name: Seed

item:sprout.description: A plant pretending it has a future.
item:sprout.name: Sprout

item:stone-block.description: Stone that finally agreed to geometry.
item:stone-block.name: Stone Block

item:townhall-1.description: A tiny bureaucracy that spits out progress.
item:townhall-1.name: Town Hall I

item:townhall-4.description: Bureaucracy with sparkles. Humanity had options.
item:townhall-4.name: Town Hall IV

item:townhall-5.description: A municipal beast with alarming confidence.
item:townhall-5.name: Town Hall V

item:tree.description: A tiny forest economy waiting to happen.
item:tree.name: Tree

item:water.description: Liquid logistics. Somehow still your problem.
item:water.name: Water

item:wood-bundle.description: Several logs tied together, because one headache was not enough.
item:wood-bundle.name: Wood Bundle

loot:lumber-camp-1:better-1.name: Lumber Camp I Better Finds I

loot:lumber-camp-1:better-2.name: Lumber Camp I Better Finds II

upgrade:lumber-camp-1-loot.description: Upgrades the first lumber camp loot table instead of poking random percentages with a stick.
upgrade:lumber-camp-1-loot.name: Lumber Camp I Better Finds

upgrade:lumber-camp-1-speed.description: Shaves a little time off first-tier lumber production.
upgrade:lumber-camp-1-speed.name: Lumber Camp I Speed

upgrade:quarry-1-loot.description: Lets the first quarry find better rocks, because apparently holes need career growth.
upgrade:quarry-1-loot.name: Quarry I Better Finds

upgrade:quarry-1-speed.description: Makes the first quarry slightly less geological about deadlines.
upgrade:quarry-1-speed.name: Quarry I Speed
